text:
LABEL: Medicaid Enrollment Days ― January–December (01–12) 

DESCRIPTION: Number of days of Medicaid enrollment in the month, including traditional Medicaid and Medicaid 
Expansion Children’s Health Insurance Program (M-CHIP), in the month. There are separate 
variables for each of the 12 months during the year. 

SHORT NAME: MDCD_ENRLMT_DAYS_01 
MDCD_ENRLMT_DAYS_02 
MDCD_ENRLMT_DAYS_03 
MDCD_ENRLMT_DAYS_04 
MDCD_ENRLMT_DAYS_05 
MDCD_ENRLMT_DAYS_06 
 MDCD_ENRLMT_DAYS_07 
MDCD_ENRLMT_DAYS_08
